Darrell Lea liquorice is renowned for its distinct taste and quality. Here are some reasons why it’s a favourite among Australians:

  • Australian Made: Supporting local businesses, Darrell Lea produces its liquorice right here in Australia.
  • Variety of Options: From traditional flavours to innovative combinations, there’s something for every palate.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Darrell Lea liquorice gluten-free?

Yes, many Darrell Lea liquorice products are gluten-free, making them suitable for those with gluten sensitivities.

What makes Darrell Lea liquorice different from other brands?

Darrell Lea liquorice is distinguished by its soft texture and authentic, rich flavour, crafted using premium ingredients.

Can I purchase Darrell Lea liquorice in bulk?

Yes, you can buy Darrell Lea liquorice in bulk online, which is perfect for events or businesses.

Where is Darrell Lea liquorice manufactured?

All Darrell Lea liquorice is proudly made in Australia, supporting local industry and ensuring high quality.

How should I store my liquorice to maintain freshness?

Store your liquorice in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight, to keep it fresh and chewy.
